infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: IMS needs your location to attach GPS coordinates to intelligence reports and emergency SOS alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: IMS needs your location for emergency SOS alerts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: IMS uses the camera for NID card scanning.
